tool_calls: cd /home/eval && if [ -f /data/sales.csv ]; then awk -F, 'NR==1{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++){gsub(/^"|"$/,"",$i); h[$i]=i} next} {region=$(h["region"]); amount=$(h["amount"]); gsub(/^"|"$/,"",region); gsub(/^"|"$/,"",amount); sums[region]+=amount} END{for(r in sums) print r ": " sums[r]}' /data/sales.csv | sort -t: -k2,2nr; else echo 'File not found: /data/sales.csv' >&2; exit 1; fi
